economic_notes: Buffalo River Mini Mart & Gas Bar Inc. is a wholly owned business accounted for by modified equity method. NexGen Energy Inc. common shares received as income ($507,000). Dene Nation is a member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (9 Nations). Major capital projects in progress including WTP Upgrade, School Crawl Space, Subdivision, Housing, and Landfill.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). The prior year (2021) included large one-time Cold Lake Air Weapons Range settlement of $60,500,000 revenue and $60,394,119 contribution to trust, which netted to approximately $105,881 impact; these are NOT present in 2022 figures. Buffalo River Mini Mart & Gas Bar Inc. is accounted for by modified equity method (GBE), not fully consolidated. The Cold Lake Air Weapons Range Trust is excluded from consolidation as it is controlled by independent trustees. Capital segment expenses of $3,194,288 appear to relate to housing and capital construction. As at March 31, 2022, the Dene Nation was not in compliance with certain loan financial covenants and was not in compliance with the First Nations Financial Transparency Act publication requirements. No schedule of remuneration was included in the provided text. Honouraria of $497,616 noted in expenses.
